strings.settings.title: Nā Hoʻonohonoho
strings.settings.subtitle: Nā Makemake o ka Papahana
strings.lang.title: ʻŌlelo
strings.lang.intro: Ua hoʻonohonoho ʻia nā ʻōlelo nui. E hoʻoiho i kāu ʻōlelo no ka unuhi piha ʻole i ka pūnaewele — nā wehewehe, nā moʻolelo a me nā mea ʻē aʻe.
strings.lang.failed: Ua hāʻule ka hoʻoiho. E nānā i kāu pūnaewele a hoʻāʻo hou.
strings.settings.units.desc: Pehea e hōʻike ʻia ai nā mamao.
strings.settings.night.desc: ʻO ke kolu ʻulaʻula e mālama i nā maka i hōʻike ʻia i ka pouli — ʻo ka mālamalama ʻulaʻula he iki wale ka hopena i ke nana i ka pō.
strings.settings.night.auto.desc: Lilo i ʻulaʻula akomi ke poʻuli ka lani ma hope o ka napoo ʻana o ka lā.
strings.settings.location.desc: Ka wahi e helu ʻia ai ka lani.
strings.settings.haptics.desc: Uʻi ke paʻa ʻia ka pōʻaiapuni.
strings.settings.speech.desc: Heluhelu nui aku i ka pōʻaiapuni a me nā alakaʻi — no ka hoʻohana ʻole lima a me ka poʻe ʻike ʻole.
strings.settings.fov.desc: Hoʻoponopono liʻiliʻi i nā laina hōkūpā a me nā ala satelaika e like me ka lani maoli.
strings.settings.about.credits: Hana ʻia me astronomy-engine, satellite.js & Celestrak.
strings.pro.title: Planet Pointer Pro
strings.paywall.title: Wehewehe i ka Lani Piha
strings.paywall.subtitle: Kūʻai hoʻokahi wale. ʻAʻohe kūʻai mahina, ʻaʻohe waihona — nāu mau loa, piha ʻole i ka pūnaewele.
strings.paywall.feature.catalog: Nā hōkū, hōkūpā a me nā satelaika a pau
strings.paywall.feature.timeMachine: Mikini Manawa — e nānā i ka lani i kēlā me kēia lā
strings.paywall.feature.events: Nā hanana lani — uhai pō, ua hōkū, hui pū
strings.paywall.feature.night: Nana i ka pō piha (ʻōlena, akomi, ikaika)
strings.paywall.comingSoon: E wehe ʻia ana nā kūʻai i kekahi manawa — E hoʻohana i ka code wehewehe i kēia manawa.
strings.paywall.error: He kū ʻole. E hoʻāʻo hou.
strings.planets.title: Planet Pointer
strings.planets.subtitle: E koho i ka pōʻaiapuni e ʻimi i ka lani
strings.stars.title: Nā Hōkū
strings.stars.subtitle: Nā hōkū inoa {n} i ʻōlinolino loa
strings.deepsky.title: Ka Lani Hohonu
strings.deepsky.subtitle: Hōkū {n}, nebula, galaxi a me nā pūʻulu
strings.constellations.title: Nā Hōkūpā
strings.constellations.subtitle: {n} mau ʻano hōkū kaulana
strings.satellites.title: Nā Satelaika
strings.events.title: Nā Hanana Lani
strings.events.subtitle: Ka mea e hele mai ana — E kaomi no ka huakaʻi manawa
strings.events.calculating: E helu ana i nā hanana e hiki mai ana…
strings.search.name: Huli ma ke inoa…
strings.filter.showAll: Hōʻike i nā mea a pau
strings.list.gettingLocation: E ʻimi ana i kāu wahi…
strings.list.empty.planetsFav: ʻAʻohe mea punahele — E wehe i kekahi mea, kaomi ★ e hoʻohui.
strings.list.empty.visible: ʻAʻohe mea ma luna o ka pae honua i kēia manawa — E hoʻāʻo "Hōʻike i nā mea a pau".
strings.list.empty.search: ʻAʻohe mea e like ana me kāu huli.
strings.list.empty.starsVisible: ʻAʻohe hōkū ma ka papa ma luna o ka pae honua i kēia manawa.
strings.list.empty.deepskyVisible: ʻAʻohe mea lani hohonu ma luna o ka pae honua i kēia manawa.
strings.list.empty.constellationsVisible: ʻAʻohe o kēia mau hōkūpā ma luna o ka pae honua i kēia manawa.
strings.sat.overhead: ● ʻIke ʻia i kēia manawa — E nānā i luna!
strings.sat.overheadDay: Aia ma luna i kēia manawa akā mālamalama
strings.sat.overheadShadow: Aia ma luna i kēia manawa akā ma ka wehe ʻole o ka Honua
strings.sat.next: Ke alanui e hiki mai ana
strings.sat.noPass: ʻAʻohe alanui e ʻike ʻia ana i kēia manawa
strings.sat.loading: E hoʻohou ana i kā kikokikona orbit…
strings.fav.empty:
ʻAʻohe mea punahele.
E wehe i kekahi hōkūhele a hōkū, kaomi ★.
strings.fav.belowNow: ʻAʻohe o kāu mea punahele ma luna o ka pae honua i kēia manawa.
strings.fav.noMatch: ʻAʻohe mea punahele e like ana me kāu huli.
strings.point.acquiring: E hoʻomaka ana nā laʻau ʻike…
strings.point.aboveHorizon: ● Ma luna o ka pae honua
strings.point.belowHorizon: ○ Ma lalo o ka pae honua
strings.point.belowBanner: {name} ma lalo o ka pae honua — E kuhikuhi ma lalo o ka Honua.
strings.point.satBelowBanner: {name} ʻaʻole i luna i kēia manawa — E kaomi i ka ʻikepili no ke alanui e hiki mai ana.
strings.point.timeTravel: 🕰️ Huakaʻi Manawa: {when} — Kaomi e hoʻi i kēia manawa
strings.point.permBody: Hōʻike ʻo Planet Pointer i ka hoe alakaʻi ma ka wikiō kāmela ola e kuhikuhi aku iā {name}.
strings.info.passes: Nā Alanui e Hiki Mai Ana
strings.info.aboveHorizon: Ma luna o ka pae honua
strings.info.belowHorizon: Ma lalo o ka pae honua
strings.info.passNote: Manawa kūlana. Kiʻekiʻe nui = mālamalama, alanui maʻalahi.
strings.ev.lunarSub: E hele ana ka Mahina ma loko o ka wehe ʻole o ka Honua
strings.ev.solarSub: E hele ana ka Mahina ma luna o ka Lā
strings.time.title: Mikini Manawa
strings.time.subtitle: E nānā i ka lani i kēlā me kēia lā a manawa.
